name: overqwil
flavor_text: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: poison-sting
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: harden
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: bite
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: fell-stinger
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.

moves.name: minimize
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.

moves.name: water-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: brine
moves.effect: Has double power against Pokémon that have less than half their max HP remaining.

moves.name: pin-missile
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: aqua-tail
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: stockpile
moves.effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.

moves.name: spit-up
moves.effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.

moves.name: acupressure
moves.effect: Raises one of a friendly Pokémon’s stats at random by two stages.

moves.name: destiny-bond
moves.effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.

moves.name: self-destruct
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: blizzard
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: dark-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: gunk-shot
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: gyro-ball
moves.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: haze
moves.effect: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.

moves.name: hydro-pump
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: lash-out
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: liquidation
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: mud-shot
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: poison-jab
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: poison-tail
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: scale-shot
moves.effect: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: sludge-wave
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: smart-strike
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: spikes
moves.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: surf
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: throat-chop
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: toxic-spikes
moves.effect: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: venoshock
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.

moves.name: waterfall
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

abilitiesDetailed.name: poison-point
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilitiesDetailed.name: intimidate
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
